name: Configure Alpha Neurofeedback Workspace in OpenBCI GUI
description: You are a neurofeedback technician at a clinical practice that uses OpenBCI for alpha-wave anxiety treatment sessions. Configure a standardized workspace for reuse across patient visits. The workspace must feature an active EEG session in Synthetic mode with a 4-panel display layout containing the Time Series (panel 1), FFT Plot (panel 2), Band Power (panel 3), and Focus (panel 4) widgets. Set the bandpass filter to 1–40 Hz and enable Expert Mode. Document the completed workspace by saving a screenshot to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/ and export the configuration settings file to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Settings/.
